title: Period Cramps in Adult Women: 11 Herbal Tincture Remedies
description: Angelica sinensis tinctures have been used for centuries to alleviate period cramps due to their unique properties and constituents. The tincture contains a compound called ferulic acid, which acts as an anti-inflammatory, reducing pain and discomfort associated with menstrual cramps. It also contains other beneficial compounds like ligustilide and butylphthalide, which have a relaxing effect on the uterus and help to reduce spasms.
